title: spergularia media subsp. occidentalis
intro: Spergularia media subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western sandspurry, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spergularia media subsp. occidentalis include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil to make teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
